---
title: "Unit 2: Indices"
number-sections: true
number-depth: 2
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
#| output: false
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '../unit2-Indices')
from Indices import generate
from collections import defaultdict

data = generate(
    types=[
        "multiply_simple",
        "multiply_three_terms",
        "multiply_coefficients",
        "fractional_nonunit",
        "combine_same_power",
        "multiply_multivariable",
            "divide_simple",
    "divide_coefficients",
    "divide_multivariable",
       "power_simple",
    "power_coefficient",
    "power_multivariable",
    "power_negative_outer",
    "negative_evaluate",
    "negative_fraction_base",
    "negative_simplify",
    "negative_divide",
    "fractional_unit",
    "fractional_negative",
    "fractional_of_fraction",
    "zero_index",
    "fraction_simple",
    "fraction_complex",
    "fraction_multivariable",
    "fraction_nested_power",
    "numeric_multiply",
    "numeric_divide",
    "numeric_mixed",
    "write_as_power",
    "find_missing_index",
    "find_missing_divide",
    "find_missing_power",
    "identify_error",
    ],
    seed           = 42,
    count          = 6,
    show_solutions = False,
)

exercises = data["exercises"]
ws        = data["worksheet"]

# Group by difficulty
grouped = defaultdict(list)
for ex in exercises:
    grouped[ex["meta"]["difficulty"]].append(ex)
```

## 🎯 Learning Targets

{{< include Indices-Learning-Targets.qmd >}}


## 🗂️ Formula Card

{{< include Alg-Indices-formulas.qmd >}}



## 📝 Practice Problems

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### 🟢 Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("easy", []):
    print(f"::::: {{#exr-u2-{ex['number']}}}\n")
    print(f"### {ex['title']}\n")
    print(f"{ex['instruction']}\n")

    # Question parts
    for p in ex["parts"]:
        print(f"{p['label']})  ${p['question_latex']}$  ")

    # Solution callout — no blank line before
    print('\n::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}')
    print("## 🔍 View Solution\n")
    for p in ex["parts"]:
        print(f"{p['label']})  ${p['answer_latex']}$  ")
    print(":::")

    # Metadata footer — no blank line before
    print("::: exercise-meta")
    
    print('<div class="skill-container">')
    for skill in ex["meta"]["skills"]:
        print(f'  <span class="skill-badge">{skill}</span>')
    print('</div>')
    print(":::")

    print(":::::\n")

```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🟡 Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("medium", []):
    print(f"::::: {{#exr-u2-{ex['number']}}}\n")
    print(f"### {ex['title']}\n")
    print(f"{ex['instruction']}\n")

    # Question parts
    for p in ex["parts"]:
        print(f"{p['label']})  ${p['question_latex']}$  ")

    # Solution callout — no blank line before
    print('\n::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}')
    print("## 🔍 View Solution\n")
    for p in ex["parts"]:
        print(f"{p['label']})  ${p['answer_latex']}$  ")
    print(":::")

    # Metadata footer — no blank line before
    print("::: exercise-meta")
    
    print('<div class="skill-container">')
    for skill in ex["meta"]["skills"]:
        print(f'  <span class="skill-badge">{skill}</span>')
    print('</div>')
    print(":::")

    print(":::::\n")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

### 🔴 Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
for ex in grouped.get("hard", []):
    print(f"::::: {{#exr-u2-{ex['number']}}}\n")
    print(f"### {ex['title']}\n")
    print(f"{ex['instruction']}\n")

    # Question parts
    for p in ex["parts"]:
        print(f"{p['label']})  ${p['question_latex']}$  ")

    # Solution callout — no blank line before
    print('\n::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}')
    print("## 🔍 View Solution\n")
    for p in ex["parts"]:
        print(f"{p['label']})  ${p['answer_latex']}$  ")
    print(":::")

    # Metadata footer — no blank line before
    print("::: exercise-meta")
    
    print('<div class="skill-container">')
    for skill in ex["meta"]["skills"]:
        print(f'  <span class="skill-badge">{skill}</span>')
    print('</div>')
    print(":::")

    print(":::::\n")
```

::: math-sep
∑ × π ÷ √ ◆ ∞ ± ∫ ≠ Δ
:::

::::::::::

## ⚡ Test Your Knowledge {#sec-indices-worksheet}

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../assets/worksheet.css">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/pyodide/v0.25.0/full/pyodide.js"></script>
<script src="../../assets/worksheet.js"></script>

<div class="ws-toolbar no-print">
  <div class="ws-controls">
    <button class="ws-btn primary" id="btn-ws-new" onclick="wsGenerate()" disabled>🔄 New Session</button>
    <button class="ws-btn outline" onclick="wsOpenPreview()">👁️ Preview & Print</button>
    <a href="https://app.flintk12.com/activities/index-laws-tuto-cd16e0/sessions/new" target="_blank" class="ws-btn flint">🤖 Get Help</a>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-loading" class="ws-status">⏳ Loading Python...</div>
</div>

<div id="ws-container"></div>

<div id="ws-preview-overlay" class="ws-modal no-print">
  <div class="ws-modal-header">
    <span id="ws-preview-title-text">Worksheet Preview</span>
    <div class="ws-modal-btns">
      <button class="ws-btn-small print" onclick="wsPrint()">🖨️ Print PDF</button>
      <button class="ws-btn-small close" onclick="wsClosePreview()">✕ Close</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-preview-scroll" class="ws-modal-body"></div>
</div>
<script>


window.WS_CONFIG = {
  title: "Laws of Indices",
  unit: "Unit 2 · Indices",
  pyPath: "Indices.py", 
  template:"word",//standard | compact | exam | word
  count: 6,
  types: ["multiply_coefficients", "divide_coefficients",    "find_missing_divide",
    "find_missing_power","identify_error"] 
};
</script>
```
